story.iWant: to add a new lesson to a course
story.soThat: I can expand the course content as needed

task.title: Create LessonCreate container structure
task.subtask: Create `src/containers/Main/LessonCreate/` directory
Create `connect.ts` with form setup and mutation logic
Create `constants.ts` with Zod validation schema
Create `types.ts` with local type definitions
Create `index.tsx` with modal dialog and form UI

task.title: Implement Zod validation schema
task.subtask: Define `lessonSchema` with all field validations
Export `LessonFormData` type from schema inference
Define tone options as const array for dropdown

task.title: Implement form logic in connect.ts
task.subtask: Set up `useForm` with `zodResolver` and default values
Implement `$api.useMutation('post', '/api/courses/{slug}/lessons')`
Handle `onSuccess`: invalidate queries, show toast, close modal
Handle `onError`: show error toast with message
Implement dirty state tracking for unsaved changes warning

task.title: Create modal dialog UI
task.subtask: Use `Dialog` from shadcn/ui as base component
Implement form fields with `Form`, `FormField`, `FormItem`, `FormLabel`, `FormControl`, `FormMessage`
Create tone `Select` dropdown with options
Add "Cancel" and "Create Lesson" buttons with loading states
Implement unsaved changes confirmation with `AlertDialog`

task.title: Integrate with CourseDetail page
task.subtask: Add "Add Lesson" button to CourseDetail header (enable button from Story 3.1)
Import and render `LessonCreate` modal with open/close state
Pass `courseSlug` and `onSuccess` callback to modal
Pass `nextLessonNumber` for automatic ordering

task.title: Enable 'Add First Lesson' CTA in empty state
task.subtask: Update `LessonListEmpty.tsx` to enable the CTA button
Connect CTA click to open LessonCreate modal

task.title: Testing and validation
task.subtask: Test form submission with valid data (verify lesson appears in list)
Test form submission with invalid data (verify inline errors)
Test modal close behaviors (Cancel, Escape, outside click)
Test unsaved changes confirmation dialog
Run `bun typecheck` and `bun lint:fix`

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Given I am on the course detail page, When I click the "Add Lesson" button, Then a modal dialog opens with a creation form.

Given the lesson creation modal is open, Then the form includes: Title (required, min 3 characters, max 100), Duration in minutes (required, number input, min 1, max 120), Core Practice (required, describes the main meditation practice), Key Point (required, the central learning outcome), Tone (required, dropdown: Calming, Energizing, Neutral, Guided Visualization).

Given I complete the form with valid data and click "Create Lesson", Then: The lesson is created with status PENDING, The lesson appears at the end of the lesson list, A success toast shows: "Lesson created successfully", The modal closes automatically.
Given I submit the form with invalid data, Then: Inline validation errors appear below each invalid field, The form does not submit, Focus moves to the first invalid field.
Given I click outside the modal or press Escape, Then: The modal closes without saving, If I had entered data, a confirmation dialog appears: "Discard changes?".
Given I click the "Cancel" button in the modal, Then: If no changes made, modal closes immediately, If changes made, confirmation dialog appears: "Discard changes?".

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Container Pattern: connect.ts handles ALL business logic, data fetching, form handling. index.tsx is purely presentational. No business logic in component files.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Form Management: React Hook Form + Zod for declarative forms with schema validation. Use zodResolver for React Hook Form integration.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: All API interactions use openapi-react-query with auto-generated types. Use $api.useMutation for POST/PUT/DELETE operations.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Medium modals: 600px max-width (default for most forms). Dismiss via click outside, Escape key, or close button. Focus first input on open.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Labels above input (stacked). Required fields with asterisk (*). Validation on blur. Red border + error message below for errors.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Primary: Solid cyan (#7dcfff) for main actions like 'Create Lesson'. Secondary: Transparent with cyan border for 'Cancel'.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Success toast: Green background, 4s auto-dismiss. On successful mutation, show toast and navigate/close modal.

doc.title: Epics Document
doc.snippet: Create New Lesson story: Modal dialog for lesson creation with title, duration, core practice, key point, and tone fields.

doc.title: Story 3.1 Implementation
doc.snippet: Story 3.1 created: StatusBadge, LessonListItem, LessonList, LessonListEmpty components. LessonListEmpty has disabled 'Add First Lesson' button.

doc.title: Copilot Instructions
doc.snippet: Container structure: index.tsx (view), connect.ts (data logic), types.ts (local types), constants.ts (Zod schemas). Use $api hooks from @/lib/api.

file.reason: Primary hook for CourseDetail page. Need to integrate lesson creation modal state and pass callbacks. Already has lessons query that needs cache invalidation on create.
Main component where 'Add Lesson' button and LessonCreate modal will be rendered. Currently has LessonList integrated.
Empty state component with disabled 'Add First Lesson' button. Needs to accept onAddLesson callback and enable the button.
Utility functions including cn() for className merging.
Type exports for Lesson and CreateLessonData schemas from OpenAPI.
Reference for Zod schema pattern used in other containers. Follow same pattern for lessonSchema.
Reference for mutation pattern with toast notifications and query invalidation.
shadcn/ui Dialog component for modal implementation.
shadcn/ui Form components for React Hook Form integration.
shadcn/ui Select component for tone dropdown.

package.name: react-hook-form
package.purpose: Form state management with minimal re-renders

package.name: @hookform/resolvers
package.purpose: Zod resolver for React Hook Form

package.name: openapi-react-query
package.purpose: Auto-generated React Query hooks from OpenAPI

package.name: lucide-react
package.purpose: Icons: Plus, Loader2, X for modal and buttons

package.name: @radix-ui/react-dialog
package.purpose: Dialog primitive used by shadcn/ui Dialog

package.name: @radix-ui/react-select
package.purpose: Select primitive used by shadcn/ui Select

constraints.constraint: Follow Container Pattern: connect.ts for ALL logic, index.tsx purely presentational
Use OpenAPI-first approach: $api.useMutation for lesson creation, never manual fetch
Types from @/types/models (Lesson, CreateLessonData), NOT directly from api.d.ts
Use interface over type for object shapes
Single quotes for strings, consistent type imports (import type { X } from 'y')
Tailwind classes inline, no CSS modules
Form validation with Zod schemas defined in constants.ts
On successful mutation: invalidate queries with queryClient.invalidateQueries()
Toast notifications via sonner: toast.success() and toast.error()
Modal focus management: auto-focus first input on open, trap focus within modal
All form fields must have proper labels and error associations
Run bun typecheck and bun lint:fix before marking complete

interface.name: LessonData
CreateLessonData

tests.standards: Project uses TypeScript strict mode with noUncheckedIndexedAccess. Pre-commit hooks run ESLint and Prettier. Manual testing required for UI interactions. Run bun typecheck for type validation and bun lint:fix for linting.

locations.location: Manual testing via dev server (bun dev)

ideas.idea: Test: Click "Add Lesson" button opens modal with form
Test: Verify all 5 form fields render with correct labels and validation rules
Test: Submit valid form data, verify lesson appears in list with PENDING status and toast shows
Test: Submit invalid data (empty title, duration 0), verify inline errors appear and form doesn't submit
Test: Enter data then click outside modal, verify confirmation dialog appears
Test: Click Cancel with no changes (modal closes) vs with changes (confirmation shows)
Test: Verify new lesson appears at end of list with correct lessonNumber
Test: Keyboard navigation through form fields and modal controls
